troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting Managed Mac Setup
troubleshooting.shortdesc: Use this topic to identify common setup problems and recommended actions.

cause.p: The email address, password, or network connection may be incorrect, or the account may not be ready.

ul.li:
Verify your email address.
Example: jbob@mycompany.com
Confirm your password is correct and not expired.
Restart your Mac and try again.

cause.p: The authentication app may not be available, up to date, or presenting a current code.

ul.li: Check that your authentication app is available and up to date.
Ensure the code is current before entering it.

cause.p: The connection may fail because of incorrect credentials, incomplete MFA, or lack of network connectivity.
Application installation may still be in progress or the apps may need to be installed from Self Service.

ul.li: Open Self Service to install apps.
Wait a few minutes and try again.

cause.p: Enrollment may still be completing or the application may not yet be available on the Mac.

ul.li: Wait a few minutes for enrollment to complete.
Contact IT if Self Service still does not appear.
